The club competed in the [[2022 Super League season|2022 Super League]] and the [[2022 Challenge Cup]]. This was Castleford's first season under [[Lee Radford]] as head coach. The team was captained by [[Paul McShane (rugby league)|Paul McShane]]. They finished the Super League season in 7th place, falling short of play-off qualification in the final round. ==Pre-season friendlies== {| class="wikitable" style="font-size:85%;" !Date and
